        \noalign{\vskip 2mm}
        \caption[Continue reading (CLMM)]{\textbf{Continue reading}, Part~1 isolated reading (1 = would not continue, 5 = would continue; $N=60$). Full \texttt{summary()} from an ordinal cumulative link mixed model (\textbf{CLMM}; \texttt{q4} $\sim$ \texttt{type} + \texttt{order} + \texttt{(1|reader)} + \texttt{(1|book)}). In this formula, the \texttt{q4} Likert rating is modeled as a function of translation \texttt{type} (\htr{} vs.\ \mtr{}, with \htr{} as reference), reading \texttt{order} (\htr{}-first vs.\ \mtr{}-first), and random intercepts for each \texttt{reader} and \texttt{book} (because each participant rates two excerpts and each book appears twice). A negative \texttt{typeMT} coefficient means \mtr{} was rated lower than \htr{}. Summary OR (odds ratio) and 95\% CI (confidence interval) displayed in \autoref{tab:clmm_clm_stats_results}. No reliable difference between \htr{} and \mtr{} ($p > 0.05$).}
        \label{tab:q4_continue_reading_clmm} \\
    \endlastfoot
